messages.content: paraphrase: Are you still faced the issue on Nahla wa Nahil? If yes Could you please provide us with the page URL for the image you attached please?
Are you still experiencing the problem with Nahla wa Nahil? If so, could you please give us the URL of the page where you attached the image?
Are you still encountering the problem regarding Nahla wa Nahil? In case you are, could you kindly share the specific web address (URL) of the page where you have attached the image?

paraphrase: I was in contact with iDev regarding the last training for IPA, they asked me to provide them with the recording. 

CUCA shared with me the list of attendance of the last training and I'm preparing the certificates for them.

I saw a couple of emails from Sis for text translation 

once complete these tasks, I will start sending the emails to the Iraqi list

I communicated with iDev about the previous IPA training, and they requested the recording from me.

CUCA provided me with the attendance list for the last training session, and I am currently preparing certificates for the participants.

I noticed a few emails from Sis regarding text translation.

Once I finish these tasks, I will begin sending emails to the Iraqi list.

paraphrase: Mr. Ahmad Matalqa is our Library Contact person, and I informed him that will transfer the Admin account for him but he asked me to not transfer until return back to me regarding this. 

I just sent a follow up message and will share it here once the response

Our Library Contact person is Mr. Ahmad Matalqa, and I notified him that I would transfer the Admin account to him. However, he requested that I hold off on the transfer until he gets back to me on this matter.

I have just sent a follow-up message, and I will provide an update here once I receive a response.
paraphrase: Contact your account manager today!
Get in touch with your account manager right away!
